page.title: AI Diagnostics providers
page.subtitle: Workspace-wide LLM judge providers used by AI-assisted insights. Shared across every user; API keys are stored encrypted.

empty.title: No AI Diagnostics provider configured yet
empty.subtitle: Add the first one and set it as default to enable AI-assisted features

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Disabled providers are kept but never used.
enabled.lockedHelp: The default provider is always enabled.

isDefault.label: Set as default
isDefault.help: AI-assisted features use the default provider. Only one default is allowed; promoting this one unsets the previous default.

sheet.rotateKeyHint: Replace the stored API key. Leave off to keep the saved key.
sheet.rotateKeyRequired: Enter a new API key, or uncheck Rotate to keep the saved one

delete.title: Delete provider {{name}}?
delete.body: This provider configuration will be removed. If it was the default, AI-assisted features will be disabled until you set another default.

test.fillFirst: Fill Base URL and Model first; a new provider also requires an API Key

errors.nameTaken: Provider name already taken, try another

settings.title: AI Diagnostics (Global)
settings.desc: Manage the workspace-wide LLM judge providers used by AI-assisted insights. The default provider is used when AI features run.
